body:
## What this is

Frames Dealix as a **Saudi-first AI Business Operating System** — not just a targeting/revenue engine. The market-intelligence engine is one engine inside a larger system. Adds a bilingual (AR+EN parallel) launch-doctrine docs layer across six directories, wedge-first on the **Command Sprint**.

Docs-only change. No code, config, or dependency edits. 39 new docs + 2 README updates (~2,770 lines).

## Structure

| Layer | Files |
|---|---|
| `docs/00_platform_truth/` | source of truth, OS architecture, product family, **module status map**, **launch control tower** |
| `docs/01_go_to_market/` | command sprint offer, **price authority** (single source of truth), market intelligence OS, targeting scorecard, sales playbook, partner strategy |
| `docs/02_operating_systems/` | 12 one-pagers (Command, Market Intelligence, Revenue, Proof, Delivery, Client, Support, Finance, Data, Governance, Partner, Academy) |
| `docs/03_governance/` | human approval, claims register, no-spam, research source, data retention, PDPL readiness, external actions |
| `docs/04_delivery/` | 7-day sprint delivery OS, customer folder template, proof pack template, acceptance criteria |
| `docs/05_founder/` | daily command, weekly board review, CEO scorecard, launch go/no-go |
| `customers/` | per-customer delivery folder marker (created only after payment; no PII in committed logs) |

## Doctrine guarantees

- **Honors the 11 non-negotiables** — no auto-send, no cold WhatsApp/LinkedIn automation, no scraping behind login, no fake proof, no guaranteed-revenue claims, no external action without founder approval, every target needs evidence, every paid customer gets a delivery folder + Proof Pack.
- **Single sources of truth** — every price defers to `PRICE_AUTHORITY.md`; every module's readiness defers to `MODULE_STATUS_MAP.md`. No doc restates a price or status independently.
- **No invented metrics** — every launch count (paid sprints, proof packs, MRR) is an honest **0** at this pre-revenue baseline.
- Each customer-facing file ends with the bilingual disclaimer: *Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة*.

## Sellable now vs. future

- **Sellable now (wedge):** Command Sprint = Market Intelligence + Revenue + Proof + Command + Governance Lite + Delivery Lite.
- **BETA/INTERNAL:** Command, Market Intelligence, Revenue, Proof, Governance, Data (BETA); Delivery, Client, Finance (INTERNAL).
- **FUTURE:** Support OS, Partner OS, Academy OS.

## Verification

- Diff is docs/README/customers only — no code paths touched.
- `scripts/security_smoke.py` flags only pre-existing test-fixture placeholders; none of the new docs are flagged.
- Heavy `prod-verify` bundle not run — irrelevant to a docs-only change.

## Go / No-Go

**No-Go for public launch** (0 paid customers, 0 proof packs) — by design. This PR builds the doctrine that makes a *private* launch executable. See [`LAUNCH_GO_NO_GO.md`](docs/05_founder/LAUNCH_GO_NO_GO.md).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01FK6ajtZdaK632EjkRFzAZX

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01FK6ajtZdaK632EjkRFzAZX)_

commits.messageBody:
Frame Dealix as a Saudi-first AI Business Operating System (not just a
targeting/revenue engine). Add a bilingual AR+EN launch-doctrine docs
layer across six directories, wedge-first on the Command Sprint.

- 00_platform_truth: source of truth, OS architecture, product family,
  module status map, launch control tower (honest pre-revenue baseline)
- 01_go_to_market: command sprint offer, price authority (single source
  of truth), market intelligence OS, targeting scorecard, sales playbook,
  partner strategy
- 02_operating_systems: 12 one-pagers (Command, Market Intelligence,
  Revenue, Proof, Delivery, Client, Support, Finance, Data, Governance,
  Partner, Academy) each with verbatim status
- 03_governance: human approval, claims register, no-spam, research
  source, data retention, PDPL readiness, external actions policies
- 04_delivery: 7-day sprint delivery OS, customer folder template,
  proof pack template, acceptance criteria
- 05_founder: daily command, weekly board review, CEO scorecard,
  launch go/no-go gate
- customers/: per-customer delivery folder marker (created only after
  payment; no PII in committed logs)
- README.md / README.ar.md: Launch OS navigation in both languages

Honors the 11 non-negotiables. Prices defer to PRICE_AUTHORITY; readiness
defers to MODULE_STATUS_MAP. No invented metrics — all launch counts are
an honest 0 at this pre-revenue baseline.
